name: case-attach
description: Links content to a legal or business case, establishing the relationship between the tagged content and the case record.

case-id.description: Unique case identifier (e.g. docket number, internal case reference, matter ID).

relation.description: Nature of the relationship. evidence = supporting fact; timeline = chronological event; exhibit = formal attachment; correspondence = communication record.

scope_rules.description: Section-level attaches a block of content to a case. Inline attaches a specific reference or mention.
